ablation.description: Incremental signal ablation using grouped prompt-level CV

confidence_calibration.description: Confidence-correctness calibration. Tests whether model confidence (margin_mean) reliably predicts accuracy, and identifies CoreVital signals that catch confident-but-wrong runs.

difficulty_stratified.description: Difficulty-stratified signal analysis. Tests whether CoreVital signals are equally predictive on easy, medium, and hard questions.

focus_05_difficulty.description: Prompt-level signal correlation with empirical difficulty
focus_05_difficulty.difficulty_definition: 1 - mean(correct) pooled across all models and temperatures

focus_06_cross_model.fingerprint_note: Fingerprint has 25 dimensions. Inspection shows these are concatenated summary statistics (fp_00=entropy_mean, fp_01=entropy_std, etc.), NOT a learned embedding. Fingerprint analysis is therefore redundant with named feature analysis and should not be treated as independent evidence.

format_failure.description: Format failure analysis — can CoreVital signals predict output format failures?

outcome_profiling.description: Three-way outcome profiling: do correct, incorrect, and format-failure runs have distinct signal signatures, or is failure a single spectrum?
outcome_profiling.key_finding_preview: Signals that are specific to ONE outcome (high gap) indicate distinct failure modes. Signals that are strong for multiple outcomes indicate a shared failure spectrum.

ranking.description: Best-of-k selection using run-varying CoreVital signals
ranking.restriction: Only prompts with at least 1 correct run

risk_calibration.description: Risk score calibration and saturation analysis

signal_redundancy.description: Signal redundancy mapping. Clusters correlated signals (|r| > 0.80) into families and identifies the best representative per family.

temperature_effects.description: Temperature effect decomposition. Tests whether CoreVital signal distributions and predictive power change between temperatures.
